name: Lich's Dungeon
short_description: Lich's Dungeon is an autobattler roguelike RPG, buy and upgrade skills, find synergies and use powerful items in your quest to defeat the undying lich.
detailed_description:
Lich's Dungeon is an autobattler rougelike RPG, where you buy and upgrade skills, find synergies and use powerful items in your quest to defeat the undying lich.

Build your character with an array skills and powerful items to fight the unrelenting Lich.
Between rounds spend your experience and money to upgrade skills existing skill and acquire new ones, while improving your gear. Fight for your life as the lich grows ever stronger.

As you defeat the Lich each round you gain gold and XP. Spend your gold improving your gear and buy new skill books then use your XP to improve your skills to complement your character build.

-Wide variety of skills and powerful synergies between them.
-Lich reactively upgrades it's defence to counter your build.
-Use game changing special abilities at an opportune time to turn the tide of battle in your favour.
-Unlock new skill books as you progress through the rounds.
-If you fall in battle, your efforts are rewarded with more starting XP and gold on future attempts.

supported_languages:
English*, French*, Italian*, German*, Spanish - Spain*, Japanese*, Korean*, Russian*, Simplified Chinese*
*languages with full audio support
